mapper.sql: id, article_id, version_no, title, content, summary, saved_by, created_at
id, article_id, version_no, title, summary, saved_by, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_article_version WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY version_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article_version (article_id, version_no, title, content, summary, saved_by, created_at) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{versionNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{savedBy}, NOW())
